allow: Bash(node bin/gitmate.js config set tone detailed)
Bash(node bin/gitmate.js config set tone concise)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('History entries:', len\(d['history']['changes']\)\); print\('Created:', d['history']['created']\); [print\(f\\"  {c['hash'][:7]} {c['message'][:50]}\\"\) for c in d['history']['changes']]")
PowerShell(cd e:\\node projects\\gitm8; $json = node src/cli.js who src/cli.js:1 --json 2>&1 | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.history)
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('scripts:', JSON.stringify\(p.scripts\)\); console.log\('devDeps:', JSON.stringify\(p.devDependencies\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('File mode: OK | contributors:', d.contributors.length, '| commits:', d.totalCommits\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('who-final.json','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d.trim\(\)\); console.log\('File mode: OK | contributors:', j.contributors.length, '| commits:', j.totalCommits\)")
